title: REAPER API Gap Implementation
description: Implement all missing rea-rs features and complete partial REAPER implementations in the daw workspace. Covers peak metering, render/bounce, audio accessor, PCM source, actions/keybindings, automation items, send envelopes, project ext state, audio buffer hooks, HWND/window management, theme colors, raw MIDI, resource paths, track templates, and completing existing stubs.

title: Track Peak Metering & Waveform Data
description: Implement peak metering service for realtime track peak levels (per-channel VU/PPM) and take waveform peak data for display. rea-rs provides Track::peak(channel) and Take::peaks() -> TakePeaksResult. Requires new PeakService in daw-proto with: get_track_peak(project, track_ref, channel) -> f64, get_take_peaks(project, take_ref, block_size) -> PeakData. REAPER low-level: Track_GetPeakInfo, Track_GetPeakHoldDB, PCM_Source_GetPeaks.

title: HWND / Window Management
description: Implement window handle access for REAPER windows. rea-rs provides Hwnd type and MIDIEditor HWND access. New WindowService with get_main_hwnd, get_midi_editor_hwnd, get_focused_fx_window. Window handles as opaque u64 for cross-process safety.
acceptance_criteria: WindowService trait in daw-proto. ReaperWindow impl using GetMainHwnd, MIDIEditor_GetActive. Window handle as opaque u64. cargo check passes.

title: Theme Color Access
description: Implement REAPER theme color reading/setting. rea-rs provides ThemeColor enum and get/set_theme_color. New ThemeService with get_theme_color, set_theme_color, list_theme_colors. ThemeColorKey enum for major REAPER theme keys. Native color conversion.
acceptance_criteria: ThemeService trait in daw-proto. ThemeColorKey enum. ReaperTheme impl using GetThemeColor/SetThemeColor. Native color conversion. cargo check passes.

title: Raw MIDI Buffer Access
description: Add raw MIDI byte buffer access alongside typed MIDI events. rea-rs provides Take::get_midi() raw bytes. Add get_raw_midi(take_ref) -> Vec<u8> and set_raw_midi(take_ref, data) to MidiService. Use MIDI_GetAllEvts/MIDI_SetAllEvts.
acceptance_criteria: get_raw_midi and set_raw_midi methods on MidiService. ReaperMidi impl using MIDI_GetAllEvts/MIDI_SetAllEvts. cargo check passes.

title: Resource Path Access
description: Expose REAPER resource paths: resource directory, INI file path, color theme path. rea-rs provides resource_path(), color_theme_path(), ini_file(). Add to ProjectService or new ResourceService. Use GetResourcePath low-level API.
acceptance_criteria: get_resource_path, get_ini_file_path, get_color_theme_path methods. ReaperResource impl. Standalone returns mock paths. cargo check passes.

title: Track Templates (Dedicated API)
description: Dedicated track template save/load beyond raw chunk get/set. rea-rs provides TrackTemplates and save_as_track_template. New TemplateService with save_track_template, load_track_template, list_track_templates.
acceptance_criteria: TemplateService trait in daw-proto. ReaperTemplate impl. Template files in REAPER resource path. cargo check passes.

title: Complete AutomationService REAPER Implementation
description: ReaperAutomation is an empty TODO stub -- none of the 14 AutomationService methods are connected to REAPER APIs. Wire up all methods: get_envelopes, get_envelope, set_visible, set_armed, set_automation_mode, get_points, get_points_in_range, get_value_at, add_point, delete_point, set_point, delete_points_in_range, get/set_global_automation_override. Use REAPER APIs: GetTrackEnvelope, GetTrackEnvelopeByChunkName, GetEnvelopePoint, InsertEnvelopePoint, DeleteEnvelopePoint, SetEnvelopePoint, Envelope_Evaluate, GetSetAutomationItemInfo.
acceptance_criteria: All 14 AutomationService methods implemented in ReaperAutomation. Envelope queries return real data from REAPER. Point CRUD modifies actual envelopes. cargo check passes.

title: Implement ReaperPositionConversion
description: PositionConversionService has no REAPER implementation at all -- only StandalonePositionConversion exists. Create ReaperPositionConversion implementing all 7 methods: time_to_beats, beats_to_time, time_to_quarter_notes, quarter_notes_to_time, quarter_notes_to_measure, beats_to_quarter_notes, quarter_notes_to_beats. Use REAPER APIs: TimeMap2_timeToBeats, TimeMap2_beatsToTime, TimeMap_QNToTime, TimeMap_timeToQN, TimeMap2_QNToMeasures.
acceptance_criteria: ReaperPositionConversion struct created in daw-reaper. All 7 methods implemented using REAPER low-level APIs. Registered as PositionConversionServiceDispatcher. cargo check passes.

title: Complete MidiService Write Operations
description: All MidiService mutate methods are readonly_warn no-ops in ReaperMidi: add_note, add_notes, delete_note, delete_notes, delete_selected_notes, set_note_pitch/velocity/position/length/channel/selected/muted, select_all_notes, transpose_notes, quantize_notes, humanize_notes. Also CC/pitch bend/program change/sysex reads return empty Vec, and add_cc/delete_cc/set_cc_value/add_pitch_bend are stubs. Implement all using REAPER MIDI APIs: MIDI_InsertNote, MIDI_DeleteNote, MIDI_SetNote, MIDI_InsertCC, MIDI_SetCC, MIDI_DeleteCC, MIDI_InsertTextSysexEvt.
acceptance_criteria: All 16+ write methods functional in ReaperMidi. CC/PB/PC/SysEx reads return real data. MIDI_Sort called after mutations. cargo check passes.

title: Complete LiveMidiService Device I/O
description: 12 of 13 LiveMidiService methods are stubs in ReaperLiveMidi -- only stuff_midi_message works. Implement: get_input_devices, get_output_devices, get_input_device, get_output_device, open_input_device, close_input_device, open_output_device, close_output_device, send_midi, send_midi_batch, subscribe_input, unsubscribe_input. Use REAPER APIs: GetMIDIInputName, GetMIDIOutputName, GetMaxMidiInputs, GetMaxMidiOutputs for enumeration. MIDI send via StuffMIDIMessage with appropriate target.
acceptance_criteria: Device enumeration returns real MIDI device list. Device open/close functional. send_midi works. subscribe_input streams incoming MIDI. cargo check passes.

title: Complete TakeService Stubs
description: Three TakeService methods are stubs in ReaperTake: delete_take, set_preserve_pitch, set_color. Implement using REAPER APIs: DeleteTake for delete, SetMediaItemTakeInfo_Value with B_PPITCH for preserve pitch, SetMediaItemTakeInfo_Value with I_CUSTOMCOLOR for color.
acceptance_criteria: delete_take removes the take from its item. set_preserve_pitch toggles pitch preservation. set_color sets take color. cargo check passes.
close_reason: Implemented set_preserve_pitch and set_color for takes, documented delete_take limitation (REAPER API has no DeleteTake function)

title: Render / Bounce Configuration
description: Implement render/bounce service for configuring and triggering offline renders. rea-rs covers: render directory, file pattern, format, bounds mode, sample rate, channels, tail settings. New RenderService in daw-proto with get/set render settings, trigger render. REAPER APIs: GetSetProjectInfo_String for RENDER_FILE/RENDER_PATTERN/RENDER_FORMAT, Main_OnCommandEx for render action. Types needed: BoundsMode, RenderSettings, RenderFormat, RenderTail.

title: Complete ItemService Stubs
description: Two ItemService gaps: ItemRef::Guid resolution returns None, and set_locked is a no-op. Fix GUID resolution by iterating items and matching GUID via GetSetMediaItemInfo_String with GUID. Implement set_locked using SetMediaItemInfo_Value with C_LOCK.
acceptance_criteria: ItemRef::Guid resolves to correct MediaItem pointer. set_locked toggles item lock state. cargo check passes.
close_reason: Implemented ItemRef::Guid resolution and set_locked for items

title: UndoFlags on end_undo_block
description: Add UndoFlags bitflags parameter to end_undo_block describing what changed (tracks, items, FX, etc). rea-rs passes UndoFlags to end_undo_block. Currently daw only accepts a label string. Add UndoFlags enum/bitflags to daw-proto, update ProjectService::end_undo_block signature, implement in ReaperProject using Undo_EndBlock2 with flags parameter.
acceptance_criteria: UndoFlags type in daw-proto. end_undo_block accepts flags. ReaperProject passes flags to REAPER. Backward compatible (default = all). cargo check passes.

title: Typed ExtState with Serde
description: Add typed ExtState<T> access with automatic JSON serialization on top of the string-based ExtState API. rea-rs provides ExtState<T> with serde. Add get_typed/set_typed methods to daw-control ExtState client that serialize/deserialize via serde_json. Keep daw-proto string-only for WASM compat.
acceptance_criteria: ExtState client has get_typed<T>/set_typed<T> methods. Uses serde_json under the hood. Type errors return clear error messages. cargo check passes.

title: MIDI AfterTouch and Channel Pressure Events
description: Add AfterTouch (poly key pressure) and Channel Pressure events to MidiService. rea-rs has AfterTouchMessage and ChannelPressureMessage. Add get_aftertouch/add_aftertouch and get_channel_pressure/add_channel_pressure to MidiService. Add corresponding types to daw-proto MIDI types.
acceptance_criteria: AfterTouch and ChannelPressure types in daw-proto. Read/write methods on MidiService. ReaperMidi implementation. cargo check passes.

title: MIDI Notation Events
description: Add MIDI notation event support. rea-rs has NotationMessage and Notation enum for REAPER notation meta-events (0xFF 0x0F). Variants: Note (channel, note, tokens), Track (tokens), Unknown. Add to MidiService as get_notation_events/add_notation_event.
acceptance_criteria: NotationEvent type in daw-proto. Read/write methods on MidiService. ReaperMidi parses 0xFF 0x0F events. cargo check passes.

title: UI Dialogs and Refresh Control
description: Implement REAPER UI utility functions: GetUserInputs dialog wrapper, browse_for_file/save_file/directory file pickers, PreventUIRefresh batching. New UiService in daw-proto or extend ProjectService.
acceptance_criteria: get_user_inputs, browse_for_file, browse_for_directory, prevent_ui_refresh_scope methods. ReaperUi implementation. cargo check passes.

title: INI File Read/Write
description: Read and write REAPER configuration values from reaper.ini. Use get_ini_file + standard INI parsing, or REAPER API if available. Useful for reading/modifying REAPER preferences programmatically.
acceptance_criteria: get_ini_value and set_ini_value methods. ReaperIni implementation. cargo check passes.

title: FX Presets File Management
description: Access and manage FX preset files (reaper-fxfolders.ini). rea-rs provides fx_presets_file() -> FxPresets. List available presets per FX, import/export preset files.
acceptance_criteria: Preset file listing and management methods. ReaperFxPresets implementation. cargo check passes.

title: Project Templates
description: List and access project template files. rea-rs provides project_templates() -> ProjectTemplates. Enumerate available project templates from REAPER resource directory.
acceptance_criteria: list_project_templates method. ReaperProjectTemplates implementation. cargo check passes.

title: Script Registration
description: Register/unregister ReaScripts in REAPERs action list. rea-rs provides add_remove_rea_script(). Enables dynamic script management from extensions.
acceptance_criteria: register_script and unregister_script methods. ReaperScript implementation. cargo check passes.

title: Audio Accessor (Sample Data Reading)
description: Implement AudioAccessor for reading interleaved sample data from tracks and takes. Essential for waveform rendering, offline analysis, and audio processing. rea-rs provides AudioAccessor with get_sample_block_raw() -> Vec<f64>, has_state_changed(), start/end times. REAPER low-level: CreateTrackAudioAccessor, CreateTakeAudioAccessor, AudioAccessorStateChanged, GetAudioAccessorSamples, DestroyAudioAccessor.

title: MIDI Device Reinit and Peak Cache Management
description: Two small utility APIs: midi_reinit() to reinitialize MIDI devices, and clear_peak_cache() for peak cache management. rea-rs exposes both. Add to LiveMidiService and AudioEngineService respectively.
acceptance_criteria: midi_reinit on LiveMidiService. clear_peak_cache on AudioEngineService. Both implemented in REAPER backend. cargo check passes.

title: ProjectStateContext Hooks
description: Implement ProjectStateContext trait for low-level project state serialization/deserialization hooks. Allows extensions to persist custom data within .RPP project files. rea-rs provides the trait pattern. Uses plugin_register with projextstate.
acceptance_criteria: ProjectStateContext trait in daw-proto. Registration/deregistration in ReaperProject. Custom state survives project save/load cycle. cargo check passes.

title: PCM Source / Media Source Metadata
description: Implement media source metadata access: filename, channel count, sample rate, length, type string, normalization. rea-rs provides Source struct wrapping PCM_source. New fields on TakeInfo or dedicated SourceService. REAPER low-level: GetMediaSourceFileName, GetMediaSourceNumChannels, GetMediaSourceSampleRate, GetMediaSourceLength, GetMediaSourceType. Also needed: source section info for looped/sectioned sources.

title: Actions / Command IDs / Key Bindings
description: Implement action system service for registering custom actions, managing command IDs, binding keyboard shortcuts, and intercepting action execution. rea-rs provides: Action struct, register_action(), register_gaccel(), perform_action(), KeyBinding with FVirt/VKeys. New ActionService in daw-proto with: register_action, unregister_action, perform_action(command_id), get_action_name, bind_key, unbind_key. REAPER: plugin_register for gaccel, NamedCommandLookup, Main_OnCommandEx.

title: Automation Items (Pooled)
description: Implement automation item support with pool semantics. rea-rs has AutomationItem with pool_id, pool_length_in_quarters. Extend AutomationService with: get_automation_items(envelope), add_automation_item, delete_automation_item, set_pool_id, get_pool_length. REAPER: GetSetAutomationItemInfo, CountAutomationItems, InsertAutomationItem, DeleteEnvelopePointRangeEx (for AI points).

title: Send/Receive Envelope Access
description: Extend AutomationService to support envelopes on sends and receives. rea-rs provides GenericSend::get_envelope(). EnvelopeLocation must support send/receive refs. Implement in ReaperAutomation via GetTrackSendInfo_Value + GetTrackEnvelopeByChunkName.
acceptance_criteria: EnvelopeLocation supports send/receive envelope references. AutomationService methods work with send/receive envelope refs. cargo check passes across daw workspace.

title: Project-Scoped ExtState
description: Add project-scoped ext state saved with .RPP file. rea-rs differentiates GetProjExtState/SetProjExtState from global GetExtState/SetExtState. Add get_project_ext_state, set_project_ext_state, has_project_ext_state to ExtStateService. Implement in ReaperExtState using low-level GetProjExtState/SetProjExtState. Update StandaloneExtState and daw-control client.
acceptance_criteria: Project ext state methods added to trait. ReaperExtState calls low-level GetProjExtState/SetProjExtState. StandaloneExtState uses per-project HashMap. ExtState client handle updated. cargo check passes.
close_reason: Added project-scoped ExtState methods to ExtStateService trait. ReaperExtState implements using GetProjExtState/SetProjExtState REAPER APIs. StandaloneExtState uses per-project HashMap keyed by (project_guid, section, key). All 4 methods implemented: get/set/delete/has_project_ext_state.

title: Audio Buffer Hooks (Realtime DSP Callback)
description: Implement OnAudioBuffer callback for real-time audio processing. rea-rs provides audio_hook_register_t. New AudioHookService with register/unregister. Callback receives sample buffer, channel count, sample rate, nframes. Safe registration/deregistration lifecycle.
acceptance_criteria: AudioHookService trait in daw-proto. ReaperAudioHook using audio_hook_register_t. Safe lifecycle management. cargo check passes.
